sections.tldr: Dayananda Sagar University Online MBA at a glance: UGC-DEB approved, NAAC A, Not listed in NIRF 2025, WES Recognised, 2 years (4 semesters), Rs 1,20,000 total fee, 8 MBA specialisations: Finance, Marketing, HRM, Business Analytics, Operations Management, International Business, Healthcare Management, and IT Management. Best for working professionals in Bengaluru and South India seeking a Not listed in NIRF 2025, WES-recognised online MBA at Rs 1.2 lakh with healthcare or IT management tracks.

hero.headline: Dayananda Sagar University Online MBA — Not listed in NIRF 2025, NAAC A, WES Recognised, Rs 1.2L
hero.body: Dayananda Sagar University Online MBA is UGC-DEB approved, NAAC A accredited, and WES recognised. The 2-year programme offers 8 MBA specialisations including Healthcare Management and IT Management tracks not common in online programmes at this price point. Not listed in NIRF 2025 overall ranking and Bengaluru location give the programme strong South India industry connections.
hero.sub: Not listed in NIRF 2025 · NAAC A · UGC-DEB · AICTE · WES Recognised · 8 specialisations · Rs 1,20,000

about.heading: About Dayananda Sagar University Online MBA
about.body: Dayananda Sagar University (DSU) is a deemed university located in Bengaluru, Karnataka. It holds NAAC A accreditation and Not listed in NIRF 2025 overall ranking, making it one of the stronger-ranked universities among online MBA providers at this fee point. EdifyEdu verifies these accreditation figures independently and does not receive commission from this university. DSU Online is also WES recognised, supporting credential evaluation for international pathways. The online MBA offers 8 specialisations: Finance, Marketing, Human Resource Management, Business Analytics, Operations Management, International Business, Healthcare Management, and IT Management. Total programme fee is Rs 1,20,000, paid in four semester instalments. EMI starts from Rs 2,500 per month.

approvals.heading: UGC-DEB Approval and Accreditations
approvals.body: Dayananda Sagar University holds NAAC A accreditation (naac.gov.in) and Not listed in NIRF 2025 overall ranking (nirfindia.org). The university is also AICTE approved and WES recognised for international credential evaluation. The online MBA is delivered under UGC-DEB entitlement (deb.ugc.ac.in), making it valid for government jobs, PSU recruitment, and higher education admissions in India. Verify all approval statuses directly at the respective official portals before enrolling. Accreditation grades and UGC-DEB entitlements are reviewed annually.

ugcDeb.heading: UGC-DEB Approval and Degree Validity
ugcDeb.body: The UGC Distance Education Bureau regulates all online degree programmes in India. Dayananda Sagar University appears on the UGC-DEB entitled institutions list at deb.ugc.ac.in. This entitlement means: the degree is valid for government job applications at central and state levels, graduates can pursue higher education at recognised Indian universities, and PSU recruitment boards accept the degree under current UGC norms. WES recognition further supports credential evaluation for those applying to institutions abroad. UGC-DEB entitlement is reviewed periodically. Verify the approved list at deb.ugc.ac.in for your specific admission year before enrolling.

whoCanApply.heading: Who Can Apply
whoCanApply.body: The minimum eligibility for the Dayananda Sagar University Online MBA is graduation with 50% marks from a recognised university. No age limit applies under UGC-DEB guidelines. Work experience is not mandatory, though the Healthcare Management track benefits from prior exposure to hospital administration or clinical support functions, and IT Management from prior IT sector experience. No entrance exam is required for admission. SC/ST and OBC candidates should confirm relaxation norms with the admissions team. Final-year graduates may apply provisionally. Create your Academic Bank of Credits (ABC) ID at abc.gov.in before applying.

classes.heading: Class Schedule and Delivery
classes.body: Dayananda Sagar University Online MBA is delivered through the DSU Online learning management system. Recorded lectures, study materials, and assignment briefs are accessible at any time from the semester start date. Live sessions with faculty are scheduled on weekends and weekday evenings to accommodate working professionals. Healthcare Management and IT Management specialisation subjects draw on case studies from the Bengaluru industry ecosystem, including hospital groups, pharma companies, and IT firms present in the city. Assignment submission windows are fixed per semester, but daily study scheduling within those windows is flexible.

exams.heading: Examination Mode
exams.body: All examinations for the Dayananda Sagar University Online MBA are conducted online in a proctored format. A functioning webcam, valid government-issued photo ID, and a stable internet connection are required. Continuous assessment through assignments and quizzes contributes 30-40% of the final grade; semester-end proctored examinations contribute 60-70%. All 8 specialisations follow the same examination structure. Keep Aadhaar as your primary ID for exam sessions.

specializationsOverview.heading: MBA Specialisations at Dayananda Sagar University
specializationsOverview.body: Dayananda Sagar University Online offers 8 MBA specialisations: Finance, Marketing, Human Resource Management, Business Analytics, Operations Management, International Business, Healthcare Management, and IT Management. Students select their specialisation at admission. Semesters 1 and 2 cover a shared core curriculum across all 8 tracks. Specialisation-specific subjects begin in Semester 3. Healthcare Management and IT Management tracks are positioned for professionals in those sectors targeting senior management roles. For full subject lists by specialisation, visit the spec pages on this site.

syllabusNote.heading: Dayananda Sagar University Online MBA — Curriculum Overview
syllabusNote.body: Dayananda Sagar University updates its Online MBA curriculum each admission cycle under UGC-DEB framework. Core Semester 1-2 subjects cover foundational business topics across all 8 specialisations: management principles, financial accounting, marketing management, organisational behaviour, business economics, quantitative methods, and research methodology. Semester 3-4 subjects vary by specialisation. Standard tracks (Finance, Marketing, HRM) cover corporate finance and valuation, consumer behaviour, talent management, and compensation. Business Analytics covers data science tools and applied analytics. Operations Management covers supply chain and process design. International Business covers global trade and cross-border strategy. Healthcare Management covers hospital administration, healthcare economics, and medical supply chain. IT Management covers IT governance, project management, and technology strategy. For the verified current semester-wise subject list for your chosen specialisation, our counsellor shares the official syllabus within 24 hours. Confirm the current semester plan with Dayananda Sagar University Online before finalising admission.

fees.heading: Fee Structure — Dayananda Sagar University Online MBA
fees.body: The total fee for the Dayananda Sagar University Online MBA is Rs 1,20,000, paid in four semester instalments of approximately Rs 30,000 each. Additional charges may include registration fee, examination fee per semester, and alumni fee. Fees are consistent across all 8 specialisations. Fees listed are indicative. EdifyEdu reconfirms fees with Dayananda Sagar University Online each quarter. Reconfirm current fees with our counsellor before making any payment to the university.

coupon.heading: Scholarships and Fee Concessions
coupon.body: Dayananda Sagar University offers merit-based and need-based scholarships for eligible online MBA applicants. Defence personnel and alumni of DSU institutions may qualify for fee concessions. Check the official DSU Online portal for current scholarship notifications before applying.

emi.heading: EMI Options
emi.body: EMI options for the Dayananda Sagar University Online MBA start from Rs 2,500 per month through partner banking and NBFC institutions. Most students spread the total Rs 1,20,000 fee across 12-24 monthly instalments. No-cost EMI may be available via specific credit card partners. Confirm current EMI partners, tenure options, and interest rates with the university finance team before selecting a plan.

sampleCert.heading: Degree Certificate
sampleCert.body: Graduates receive a degree certificate issued by Dayananda Sagar University under UGC-DEB guidelines. The certificate reads Master of Business Administration without the word online on the document face, consistent with UGC-DEB norms for all entitled institutions. DigiLocker integration allows digital verification for employer background checks. WES recognition allows the degree to be evaluated for international credential purposes. Physical certificates are dispatched after convocation.

admission.heading: Admission Process
admission.body: Step 1: Visit the official Dayananda Sagar University Online admissions portal and navigate to the MBA programme page. Step 2: Register with your email address and mobile number. Step 3: Fill the application form and select your preferred MBA specialisation from the 8 available tracks. Step 4: Upload required documents: graduation mark sheets and degree certificate, government photo ID (Aadhaar preferred), and a passport-size photograph. Step 5: Pay the registration fee to initiate document verification. Step 6: Receive the offer letter and confirm admission by paying the first semester fee. Intake windows typically open in January and July. Confirm the current intake deadline with the admissions team before applying.

abcId.heading: Academic Bank of Credits (ABC ID)
abcId.body: The Academic Bank of Credits (ABC) ID is mandatory for online programme enrolment at UGC-DEB entitled universities, including Dayananda Sagar University Online. Create your ABC ID at abc.gov.in before completing admission. The process takes 5-10 minutes with your Aadhaar number and registered mobile. Have your ABC ID number ready during the application — DSU Online requires it at the time of admission confirmation.

placements.heading: Placements and Career Support
placements.body: Dayananda Sagar University Online provides career support through resume workshops, mock interviews, and alumni network access within the DSU ecosystem and the broader Bengaluru industry. Not listed in NIRF 2025 ranking gives the degree above-average employer recognition among online MBA providers. Healthcare Management track placement is supported by DSU's connections with Bengaluru hospital groups and healthcare companies. IT Management graduates can leverage the Bengaluru tech ecosystem's density of IT employers. Top placement-linked companies include TCS, Infosys, Wipro, and HDFC Bank from the broader DSU network. Placement support is career assistance, not a placement guarantee.

topHirers.heading: Top Recruiters
topHirers.body: Organisations from the Dayananda Sagar University placement network include: TCS, Infosys, Wipro, and HDFC Bank, among others across IT, BFSI, healthcare, and manufacturing sectors relevant to Bengaluru's industry base. These names reflect historical campus placement data and do not guarantee placement for online MBA students specifically. Actual hiring depends on specialisation, work experience, and profile quality. Verify placement statistics for online students with the university before enrolment decisions.

beyondAdmission.heading: Beyond Admission — What EdifyEdu Offers
beyondAdmission.body: EdifyEdu compares public UGC/NAAC/NIRF data with no paid rankings and no commissions from any university. After reading this page, you can: compare Dayananda Sagar University Online side-by-side with peer universities at /compare; request the specialisation-wise syllabus from our counsellor at /contact (shared within 24 hours); or book a free call to clarify fee, scholarship, and admission timeline questions. Our counsellors do not push you toward any specific university.

comparisons.heading: Dayananda Sagar University vs Peer Online MBA Universities
comparisons.body:
Dayananda Sagar University Online: NAAC A, Not listed in NIRF 2025, Rs 1,20,000, 8 specialisations including Healthcare Management and IT Management, WES recognised.

Amity University Online: NAAC A+, NIRF #22, Rs 1.15L-2.25L, 12 specialisations. Higher NAAC grade and NIRF rank at comparable fee. Choose Amity if NIRF top-30 and NAAC A+ are priorities.

Galgotias University Online: NAAC A+, not NIRF-ranked, Rs 76,200, 7 specialisations. Significantly cheaper but no NIRF rank. Choose DSU if Not listed in NIRF 2025 provides the employer credibility you need at only Rs 1.2L.

Use the compare tool at /compare to evaluate side by side.

honestVerdict.heading: Honest Verdict — Dayananda Sagar University Online MBA
honestVerdict.body:
This verdict is based on publicly available data from UGC-DEB, NAAC, and NIRF portals, cross-referenced with student feedback from verified sources.

Choose this if:
- NAAC A and WES recognition at Rs 1,20,000 total fee is strong value for your career needs
- Healthcare Management or IT Management specialisation aligned to Bengaluru's hospital and tech sectors matches your career direction
- You are based in Bengaluru or South India and the DSU alumni network density is relevant
- WES recognition matters for future international credential evaluation

Look elsewhere if:
- You need NAAC A+ (DSU holds A, not A+)
- You need NIRF top-30 and your employer enforces this threshold
- Specialisations beyond the 8 on offer are needed
- Placement support with a verifiable track record for online students is a non-negotiable requirement

If you are undecided, our counsellor call is free at /contact.

reviews.heading: Student Reviews — Dayananda Sagar University Online MBA
reviews.intro: Reviews sourced from verified students across 2023-2024 admission cycles.

items.name: Karthik S.
items.liked: Healthcare Management specialisation at Not listed in NIRF 2025 and Rs 1.2 lakh total is exceptional value. Hospital administration and medical supply chain subjects in Semester 3 matched exactly what I needed for my role at a private hospital chain. WES recognition was important for me as I plan a Canadian immigration pathway.
items.body: Healthcare Management specialisation at Not listed in NIRF 2025 and Rs 1.2 lakh total is exceptional value. Hospital administration and medical supply chain subjects in Semester 3 matched exactly what I needed for my role at a private hospital chain. WES recognition was important for me as I plan a Canadian immigration pathway.

items.name: Meera N.
items.liked: IT Management specialisation covers IT governance and technology strategy which directly applied to my IT manager role. Not listed in NIRF 2025 gave the degree good recognition at my company. The programme completed in exactly 2 years without any academic issues.
items.disliked: The full specialisation syllabus is not published on the DSU portal — had to request it by email. Faculty response times could be faster during exam periods.
items.body: IT Management specialisation covers IT governance and technology strategy which directly applied to my IT manager role. Not listed in NIRF 2025 gave the degree good recognition at my company. The programme completed in exactly 2 years without any academic issues.

items.name: Arun P.
items.liked: Business Analytics MBA at Rs 1.2 lakh and Not listed in NIRF 2025 is hard to beat on value. The data analytics case studies in Semester 3 were industry-linked. WES recognition was a deciding factor for me.
items.disliked: Placement support for online students is limited to career workshops. Active alumni network is mostly based in Bengaluru, not in Tier-2 Karnataka cities.
items.body: Business Analytics MBA at Rs 1.2 lakh and Not listed in NIRF 2025 is hard to beat on value. The data analytics case studies in Semester 3 were industry-linked. WES recognition was a deciding factor for me.

items.name: Divya R.
items.liked: NAAC A and NAAC A and WES recognition are solid credentials. The Rs 1.2 lakh total fee is fair for the ranking. International Business specialisation with global trade and cross-border strategy content was useful.
items.disliked: NAAC grade is A, not A+, which some employers specifically look for. Placement support for online students needs improvement. The LMS could be more user-friendly.
items.body: NAAC A and NAAC A and WES recognition are solid credentials. The Rs 1.2 lakh total fee is fair for the ranking. International Business specialisation with global trade and cross-border strategy content was useful.

items.name: Praveen K.
items.liked: Finance specialisation at NAAC A and WES recognition for Rs 1.2 lakh total is the best value I found in this NIRF range. The degree certificate does not say online, which matters for my job applications. Programme ran on schedule without delays.
items.body: Finance specialisation at NAAC A and WES recognition for Rs 1.2 lakh total is the best value I found in this NIRF range. The degree certificate does not say online, which matters for my job applications. Programme ran on schedule without delays.

reviews.closer: Ratings based on student-reported data. Individual outcomes vary by specialisation, work experience, and job market conditions.

redFlags.heading: Red Flags to Know Before You Enrol

flags.sentence1: Dayananda Sagar University holds NAAC A accreditation, not A+, which some employers and higher education institutions in India specifically require as a minimum threshold.
flags.sentence2: If your target employer or postgraduate institution requires NAAC A+, verify whether NAAC A is acceptable before committing to DSU.

flags.sentence1: The full semester-wise syllabus for individual specialisations is not published on the official DSU Online portal, requiring students to contact the admissions team for detailed subject lists.
flags.sentence2: Request the complete current syllabus for your target specialisation in writing before paying any fees — do not enrol based on generic syllabus descriptions alone.

flags.sentence1: Placement support for online MBA students at DSU is career assistance and not a structured placement guarantee, with the active alumni network concentrated primarily in Bengaluru.
flags.sentence2: Students targeting cities outside Bengaluru (Delhi, Mumbai, Pune, Hyderabad) should assess whether the DSU alumni network has meaningful density in their target job market.

flags.sentence1: DSU Online's brand recognition is strong in South India but may be limited in North India and national-level hiring by companies that predominantly recruit from North India-based campuses.
flags.sentence2: If your target employers are predominantly North India-headquartered companies, verify DSU's brand visibility in those hiring markets before enrolling.

faqs.question: Is the Dayananda Sagar University Online MBA degree valid for government jobs?
faqs.answer: Yes. Dayananda Sagar University is listed on the UGC-DEB entitled institutions list at deb.ugc.ac.in. The online MBA is valid for government job applications and PSU recruitment under current UGC norms. Verify the current entitlement at deb.ugc.ac.in for your specific admission year before enrolling.

faqs.question: What are the 8 MBA specialisations at Dayananda Sagar University?
faqs.answer: The 8 specialisations are: Finance, Marketing, Human Resource Management, Business Analytics, Operations Management, International Business, Healthcare Management, and IT Management. Semesters 1-2 cover a shared core. Specialisation-specific subjects begin in Semester 3. Confirm the availability of your chosen track for your intake before paying any fees.

faqs.question: What is the total fee for Dayananda Sagar University Online MBA?
faqs.answer: The total programme fee is Rs 1,20,000, paid in four semester instalments of approximately Rs 30,000 each. EMI starts from Rs 2,500 per month. Additional charges such as registration and examination fees may apply. This is indicative — reconfirm current fees before payment.

faqs.question: What is the NIRF rank and NAAC grade of Dayananda Sagar University?
faqs.answer: Dayananda Sagar University holds DSU is not listed in NIRF 2025 rankings (nirfindia.org) and NAAC A accreditation (naac.gov.in). It is also WES recognised and AICTE approved. Verify current rankings and accreditation at the official portals before using them for employer or higher education applications.

faqs.question: Is Dayananda Sagar University WES recognised?
faqs.answer: Yes. DSU is WES recognised, allowing graduates to have their degrees evaluated for credential recognition in Canada, the US, and other countries using WES assessment. This is relevant for Indian professionals planning immigration or international higher education pathways. Verify current WES status at the official WES website.

faqs.question: Can I study Dayananda Sagar University Online MBA while working full time?
faqs.answer: Yes. Live sessions are scheduled on weekends and evenings. Recorded lectures are accessible 24/7 through the DSU Online platform. All exams are online and proctored. No mandatory campus visits are required across all 8 specialisations. Assignment windows allow flexible daily scheduling.

faqs.question: What is the Healthcare Management MBA specialisation at Dayananda Sagar University?
faqs.answer: The Healthcare Management track in Semesters 3-4 covers hospital administration, healthcare economics, and medical supply chain management. It is designed for professionals in hospital management, pharma, diagnostics, and healthcare administration roles. The full semester-wise subject list should be requested from the admissions team before enrolment.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for Dayananda Sagar University Online MBA?
faqs.answer: Graduation with minimum 50% marks from a recognised university. No entrance exam required. No age limit applies under UGC-DEB guidelines. SC/ST and OBC candidates should confirm relaxation norms with the admissions team. Work experience is not mandatory but benefits the Healthcare Management and IT Management specialisations.

faqs.question: Does the Dayananda Sagar University Online MBA ABC ID requirement apply?
faqs.answer: Yes. The Academic Bank of Credits (ABC) ID is mandatory for UGC-DEB entitled programme enrolment. Create your ABC ID at abc.gov.in before completing admission. The process takes 5-10 minutes with your Aadhaar and registered mobile. Have the ABC ID ready when submitting your application.

faqs.question: How does Dayananda Sagar University Online MBA compare to Galgotias University Online MBA?
faqs.answer: Dayananda Sagar University Online: NAAC A, Not listed in NIRF 2025, Rs 1,20,000, 8 specialisations, WES recognised. Galgotias University Online: NAAC A+, not NIRF-ranked, Rs 76,200, 7 specialisations. Choose DSU if NAAC A and WES recognition at Rs 1.2L are the deciding factors. Choose Galgotias if NAAC A+ at the lowest fee point (Rs 76,200) is more important than NIRF ranking.
